name: com.wagenheimer.tk2dporter
description: Editor tools to migrate 2D Toolkit (tk2d) content to native Unity: sprites to Image (uGUI) or SpriteRenderer with automatic UI/world-space detection, tk2d buttons/toggles/scrollbars to Button/Toggle/Slider (with a SendMessage-compatible click/toggle relay), TextMeshPro (3D) to TextMeshProUGUI, plus a script-field migrator that mechanically updates referencing C# fields.
